name: Johnny Trigger
short_description: Stylish, deadly and smooth as a billiard ball, Johnny Trigger is a man on a mission in this non-stop platform shooter game where the action never ends!
detailed_description:
Johnny Trigger – International Man of Mayhem!

Do you have what it takes to bring down the underground world of the mafia?
“Less talk, more bullets” – that’s Johnny’s motto as he runs, jumps, spins, slides and keeps on shooting till every bad guy’s bitten the dust.




Dive straight in and get shooting! Johnny Trigger’s short but immensely satisfying levels make it the perfect action game to fill a short break.
And if you’ve got a little more time, there’s so much to collect and a new challenge round every corner.

Game features:

  • Engage in fast-paced shooting action requiring precise timing and reflexes to eliminate enemies.
  • Avoid harming civilians to prevent immediate mission failure
  • Interact with various objects scattered across levels, including explosive barrels and destructible obstacles to outsmart your enemies.
  • Manage limited ammunition wisely, strategically ricocheting bullets off surfaces and utilizing the environment to take down foes efficiently.
  • Advance through diverse levels and unlock new weapons, character outfits, and base upgrades by completing missions and collecting resources.
  • Unravel Johnny's intriguing backstory through captivating comic book segments, offering players a deeper connection to the protagonist's journey and motivations.

So what are you waiting for? Those bad guys aren’t going to beat themselves, you know.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
